questions.q: What is the primary function of a credit card?
questions.explanation: Credit cards are primarily used for making online payments, although they can also be used for cash withdrawals and other services.

questions.q: Which of the following is an example of a business service?
questions.explanation: Business services include activities such as providing finance, insurance, and internet services.

questions.q: What is the main difference between a bank and a non-banking financial company (NBFC)?
opts: (B) Bank provides loans only to individuals
(C) NBFC provides loans only to businesses
(D) Bank provides a wide range of financial services
questions.explanation: Banks and NBFCs both provide financial services, but banks provide a wide range of services, including deposits, loans, and other banking services.

questions.q: What is the main advantage of using a credit card?
questions.explanation: Credit cards provide convenience and flexibility by allowing users to make online payments and earn reward points.

questions.q: What is the primary function of an insurance company?
opts: (C) To provide financial protection against risks
questions.explanation: Insurance companies provide financial protection against risks, such as death, injury, or damage to property.

questions.q: What is the main difference between a life insurance policy and a non-life insurance policy?
opts: (A) Life insurance policy provides financial protection against death
(B) Non-life insurance policy provides financial protection against property damage
(C) Life insurance policy provides financial protection against property damage
(D) Non-life insurance policy provides financial protection against death
questions.explanation: Life insurance policies provide financial protection against death, while non-life insurance policies provide financial protection against property damage.

questions.q: Which of the following is an example of a business service that provides convenience to customers?
questions.explanation: Business services such as internet services provide convenience to customers by allowing them to access information and communicate with others online.

questions.q: What is the main advantage of using a debit card?
questions.explanation: Debit cards provide convenience and flexibility by allowing users to make online payments and access their account balance.

questions.q: What is the main difference between a savings account and a current account?
opts: (A) Savings account provides interest on deposits
(B) Current account provides interest on deposits
questions.explanation: Current accounts provide cheque facilities, while savings accounts do not.

questions.q: What is the main advantage of using a credit card for online transactions?
questions.explanation: Credit cards provide convenience and flexibility by allowing users to make online payments and earn reward points.

questions.q: What is the primary function of a non-banking financial company (NBFC)?
questions.explanation: NBFCs provide loans to businesses, as well as other financial services such as deposits and insurance.

questions.q: What is the main difference between a bank and a post office?
opts: (B) Post office provides loans to customers
questions.explanation: Banks provide loans to customers, whereas post offices do not provide loans but provide other services such as money orders and postal savings.

questions.q: Which of the following is an example of a business service that provides financial protection to customers?
questions.explanation: Business services such as insurance services provide financial protection to customers by covering them against risks such as death, injury, or damage to property.

questions.q: What is the main advantage of using a credit card for international transactions?
questions.explanation: Credit cards provide convenience and flexibility by allowing users to make international transactions and earn reward points.

questions.q: What is the primary function of an insurance broker?
opts: (C) To provide financial advice to customers
questions.explanation: Insurance brokers sell insurance policies to customers, as well as provide financial advice and other services.

questions.q: What is the main difference between a term insurance policy and a whole life insurance policy?
opts: (A) Term insurance policy provides coverage for a fixed period
(B) Whole life insurance policy provides coverage for a fixed period
(C) Term insurance policy provides coverage for a lifetime
(D) Whole life insurance policy provides coverage for a lifetime
questions.explanation: Term insurance policies provide coverage for a fixed period, whereas whole life insurance policies provide coverage for a lifetime.

questions.q: Which of the following is an example of a business service that provides financial protection to businesses?
questions.explanation: Business services such as insurance services provide financial protection to businesses by covering them against risks such as death, injury, or damage to property.

questions.q: What is the main advantage of using a credit card for business transactions?
questions.explanation: Credit cards provide convenience and flexibility by allowing businesses to make online payments and earn reward points.

questions.q: What is the primary function of a microfinance institution?
questions.explanation: Microfinance institutions provide loans to individuals, as well as other financial services such as deposits and insurance.

questions.q: Which of the following is an example of a business service that provides convenience to businesses?
questions.explanation: Business services such as internet services provide convenience to businesses by allowing them to access information and communicate with others online.

questions.q: What is the main difference between a commercial bank and a central bank?
opts: (A) Commercial bank provides loans to customers
(B) Central bank provides loans to customers
(C) Commercial bank provides currency exchange services
(D) Central bank provides currency exchange services
questions.explanation: Central banks provide currency exchange services, whereas commercial banks do not.
